description: Skill trigger test fixtures for TaskPlex v3.1.0
notes: Short prompts (~1-2 sentences) to minimize token cost (~$0.15/prompt). Each skill has 1-2 should_trigger and 1 should_not_trigger prompt.

skills.name: prd-generator
should_trigger: Build a new notification system for our app
Add user authentication to the project with OAuth
skills.should_not_trigger: What does the Read tool do?

skills.name: prd-converter
should_trigger: Convert this PRD to prd.json format so TaskPlex can execute it

skills.name: writing-plans
should_trigger: Write an implementation plan for adding search functionality to the API

skills.name: taskplex-tdd
should_trigger: Implement the new priority field on the tasks model
Add a caching layer to the user service
skills.should_not_trigger: Explain what a JWT token is

skills.name: taskplex-verify
should_trigger: I've fixed the failing tests, everything is passing now
The feature is done and working correctly
skills.should_not_trigger: What files are in the src directory?

skills.name: systematic-debugging
should_trigger: The tests keep failing with a TypeError but I don't understand why
Something is broken in the auth flow after my last change
skills.should_not_trigger: Add a comment to explain this function

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
should_trigger: Fix the broken auth tests and the failing payment tests simultaneously

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
should_trigger: Start implementing the feature branch for the new dashboard
skills.should_not_trigger: Show me the current git status

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
should_trigger: All tests pass and the feature is complete, ready to merge

skills.name: requesting-code-review
should_trigger: I've finished implementing the payment feature, can you review the code?
skills.should_not_trigger: List the agents in the agents/ directory

skills.name: receiving-code-review
should_trigger: The reviewer says my error handling is wrong and I should use Result types

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
should_trigger: Execute this implementation plan using subagents: docs/plans/feature-plan.md
skills.should_not_trigger: What is the current version in package.json?

skills.name: executing-plans
should_trigger: Run the implementation plan in a parallel session with the TaskPlex orchestrator

skills.name: writing-skills
should_trigger: Create a new skill for validating database migrations
skills.should_not_trigger: What does the Glob tool do?

skills.name: failure-analyzer
should_trigger: The implementer subagent failed with: ModuleNotFoundError: cannot import name 'BaseModel'
skills.should_not_trigger: Add a type annotation to this variable

skills.name: using-taskplex
should_trigger: What should I use TaskPlex for?
Help me understand the TaskPlex workflow
skills.should_not_trigger: List files in the current directory
